title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
